LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JAMES BASIL HAMBLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR COSTS AND FEES INCURRED IN PROCURING THE DEFAULT WHICH MAY BE APPLIED TO BY SEPARATE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ISHMAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMBLIN, BASIL JAMES DBA ADVENTURE HOMESTAYS ABROAD $54,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,657.42 INTEREST, $905.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $58,362.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
